title: openssh security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
[8.0p1-27.0.1]
- Update upstream references [Orabug: 36587718]

[8.0p1-27]
- CVE-2025-61984: Reject usernames with control characters
  Resolves: RHEL-128400
- CVE-2025-61985: Reject URL-strings with NULL characters
  Resolves: RHEL-128390
